results.title: Virat Kohli creates history, dethrones Kim Kardashian to become...
results.description: In another remarkable milestone that highlights cricket's growing global influence and the changing landscape of social media, Indian cricket superstar Virat Kohli has surpassed American media personality Kim Kardashian.

results.title: Christchurch buzzing for Te Kaha test
results.description: Te Kaha Stadium opened earlier this year. Photo: Star News Joe Porter of RNZ The wait has been a long one for Christchurch rugby fans.

results.title: Breel Embolo and Dan Ndoye on target as Switzerland end Algeria World Cup hopes
results.description: Switzerland won a World Cup knockout game for the first time since 1938.

results.title: BREAKING: Julian Nagelsmann quits Germany after World Cup disaster as Jurgen Klopp favourite for job
results.description: Germany were knocked out of the World Cup by Paraguay with Julian Nagelsmann under pressure during the tournament and now he has left his role with the national team

results.title: Embolo, Ndoye score and Switzerland moves on at the World Cup with a 2-0 win over Algeria
